panels.description: Medium shot of Elizabeth in a courtroom setting, speaking passionately to the judges, warm lighting highlighting her determined expression, courtroom benches in the background.

bubbles.text: During all that period she appeared to me the most amiable and benevolent of human creatures. She nursed my aunt, and later her own mother, with such affection.

panels.description: Medium shot of Elizabeth turning toward the prisoner box where Justine sits, weeping silently, courtroom observers murmuring in the background with cold, judgmental stares.

bubbles.text: She had no temptation for such an action; I value her esteem above all.

panels.description: Close-up of Victor's face in the back of the courtroom, sweat on his brow, eyes wide with horror and guilt, shadows cast deep across his face, hands gripping the wooden pew.

bubbles.text: I knew she was innocent. Could the daemon who murdered my brother be betraying her?

panels.description: Dynamic low angle shot of Victor rushing out of the heavy courtroom doors, his silhouette blurred by movement, cold night air outside, dark and oppressive atmosphere.

bubbles.text: I could not sustain the horror. The fangs of remorse tore my bosom. I rushed out in agony.
